title: Oru Vaanavillin Pakkathilae lyrics kadhal solla vandhaen Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers      : Udit Narayan
Composer : Yuvan Shankar Raja


Oru Vaanavillin Pakkathilae
Vaazhdhu Paarkiren Naanae
En Vaasal Mattum Nanaikum
Mazhaiyaai Paarkiraenae
Ennai Sotta Sotta Nanaiyavaithaai
Nenjai Kittatatta Karayavaithaayae
Aval Azhagenum Nathiyil Vizhugiraen Thunaiyaai
Ennai Urumaatrinaai, Kaathal Kathai Aaetrinaai

Oru Vaanavillin Pakkathilae ....

Netru Varaiyil Naan Kaatru Veesinaal
Nindru Rasithadhu Illai..
Viralgal Koarkaiyil Viruppam Koduthidum
Neruppil Erinthadhu Illai..
Thottu Paesinaal Evano Aagiraen..
Unnai Vittu Pirigaiyil Konjamaai Saagiraen..
Mithakiraen Parakiraen Maegathai Pidikiraen
Arugilae Santhiya Yogathil Kuthikiraen
Ithupothum Pennae Ithupothum

Oru Vaanavillin Pakkathilae ...

Ithupothum Pennae Ithupothum
Ithupothum Pennae Ithupothum
Enga Nadakiraen Etharku Sirikiraen
Vazhathai Marakkiraen Naanae..
Kudaigal Irunthumae Mazhaiyil Nanaivathu
Kaathal Vanthapin Thaanae..

Thanthai Arugilae Ithuvarai Thoonginaen
Thannan Thanimaiyai Indru Naan Virumbinaen
Ithu Enna Ilamaigal Nadathidum Mothala
Ithayathil Kothikkira Kazhichalae Kaathala
Ithupothum Pennae Ithupothum

Oru Vaanavillin Pakkathilae ...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, portraying the beauty of romantic feelings.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kadhal Solla Vandhen, this song highlights the protagonist's feelings for their love interest, showcasing their emotional journey.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Udit Narayan and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on June 27, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Vaanavillin Pakkathilae, the protagonist expresses their heartfelt emotions of love and longing, beautifully encapsulated through Udit Narayan's soulful rendition. The song serves as a poignant backdrop in Kadhal Solla Vandhen, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film. With Yuvan's captivating music and Na Muthukumar's evocative lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and deep affection. This melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys and sorrows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Vaanavillin Pakkathilae from the movie Kadhal Solla Vandhen is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Udit Narayan's soulful voice, combined with Yuvan's enchanting composition, creates an unforgettable listening experience. This song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and soothing music, making it a must-listen for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: I am living beside a heavenly being. I only look at my home, and I see it like rain. You have made my heart cry and feel pain. I am falling like a beautiful flower in the river. You are my support, and you have brought love into my life.

Until yesterday, I was not happy even with the wind blowing. I did not feel the fire that gives warmth. If I touch and speak, I become someone else. I drift away a little when I leave you. I am searching for the clouds and trying to catch the sky. I am getting lost in the joy of being close to you. This is all about you, this is all about a heavenly being.

This is all about you, this is all about you. Why am I smiling? I forget to celebrate. I wonder if the rain will come from the clouds. I have been sleeping near my father until now. Today, I want to embrace my loneliness. What will happen to my heart that is burning with love? This is all about you, this is all about a heavenly being.
